---
title: "TF family enrichment in significant TFs and top50 TFs"
author: "Sharan Surya"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: show
    code-tools: true
    theme: cosmo
    fig-width: 12
    fig-height: 9
    embed-resources: true
---

# Overview

To generate a plot of Uniquely differentially expressed in each tissue. Similar to Figure 4F in the manuscript, but for all targets of TFs (not just DAF-16).

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

rm(list = ls())

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  dpi = 300
)

options(scipen = 10000)

```

# Load Required Packages

```{r}
#| label: setup-libraries
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)

```


# Load Data

```{r load-log2fc-data}
# Load celest_network for bg
celest_network <- read.delim("celest/input/orthCelEsT.txt", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# detection matrix to filter bg coz they are tissue_specific
detection_matrix <- read.delim("output/detection_matrix_tissue.txt", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

all_backgrounds  <- readRDS("celest/output/all_backgrounds.rds")
all_tf_activity  <- readRDS("celest/output/all_tf_activity.rds")

tf_annotation <- read_xlsx("celest/input/Table S1 - TF annotation.xlsx", sheet = "Table S1 - TF annotation")

# top 50
top_tf_ranked <- read.table("celest/output/tf_rank_top50_score.tsv", header = TRUE)

```


```{r enrichment-overall-tf-families, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}

sig_p <- 0.05   # significance threshold

identical(names(all_tf_activity), names(all_backgrounds))

tf_family_lookup <- tf_annotation %>%
  select(wormbase_gene, wormbase_gseq, Family_for_FigS4) %>%
  distinct()

# attach family names to all_tf_activity and all_backgrounds
all_tf_activity_fam <- map(all_tf_activity, function(df) {
  df %>% left_join(tf_family_lookup, by = c("wb_id" = "wormbase_gene"))
})

all_backgrounds_fam <- map(all_backgrounds, function(tf_vec) {
  tibble(wb_id = tf_vec) %>%
    left_join(tf_family_lookup, by = c("wb_id" = "wormbase_gseq"))
})

# filter significant TFs
sig_tf_activity <- map(all_tf_activity_fam, function(df) {
  df %>% filter(p_value < sig_p)
})

# Per-tissue enrichment test function 
enrichment_one_tissue <- function(sig_df, bg_df) {
  bg_df  <- bg_df  %>% filter(!is.na(Family_for_FigS4))
  sig_df <- sig_df %>% filter(!is.na(Family_for_FigS4))

  families  <- unique(bg_df$Family_for_FigS4)
  total_bg  <- nrow(bg_df)
  total_sig <- nrow(sig_df)

  map_dfr(families, function(fam) {
    sig_in_fam <- sum(sig_df$Family_for_FigS4 == fam)
    bg_in_fam  <- sum(bg_df$Family_for_FigS4 == fam)

    mat <- matrix(
      c(sig_in_fam,               bg_in_fam - sig_in_fam,
        total_sig - sig_in_fam,   (total_bg - bg_in_fam) - (total_sig - sig_in_fam)),
      nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE,
      dimnames = list(c("in_family", "not_family"),
                       c("significant", "not_significant"))
    )

    ft <- fisher.test(mat, alternative = "greater")

    tibble(
      family          = fam,
      n_sig_in_family = sig_in_fam,
      n_sig_total     = total_sig,
      n_bg_in_family  = bg_in_fam,
      n_bg_total      = total_bg,
      odds_ratio      = unname(ft$estimate),
      p_value         = ft$p.value
    )
  })
}

enrichment_results <- map2_dfr(
  sig_tf_activity, all_backgrounds_fam,
  enrichment_one_tissue,
  .id = "tissue"
) %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  arrange(p_adj)

# Now combine results across all tissyes using Fisher's combined probability test

family_enrichment_fcombined <- enrichment_results %>%
  group_by(family) %>%
  summarise(
    n_tissues = n(),

    tissues_OR_gt1 =
      sum(odds_ratio > 1, na.rm = TRUE),

    tissues_sig =
      sum(p_value < 0.05 & odds_ratio > 1, na.rm = TRUE),

    median_OR =
      median(odds_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),

    fisher_stat =
      -2 * sum(log(p_value)),

    fisher_p =
      pchisq(
        fisher_stat,
        df = 2 * n(),
        lower.tail = FALSE
      ),

    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    fisher_FDR = p.adjust(fisher_p, method = "BH")
  ) %>%
  arrange(fisher_FDR)

```

```{r enrichment-plot}

family_enrichment_fcombined_plot <- ggplot(family_enrichment_fcombined, aes( x = reorder(family, tissues_OR_gt1), y = tissues_OR_gt1, fill = median_OR)) +
  geom_col(color = "grey30", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0("FDR=", formatC(fisher_FDR, format = "e", digits = 2),
                        "  (", tissues_OR_gt1, "/", n_tissues, ")")),
    hjust = -0.05,
    size = 3
  ) +
  coord_flip(clip = "off") +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "grey85", high = "#D62828",
    name = "Median OR"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.35))) +
  labs(
    x = "TF family",
    y = "# tissues with OR > 1",
    title = "TF family enrichment across tissues",
    caption = "Bar color = median odds ratio across tissues · Labels: Fisher-combined FDR and (# OR>1 / # tissues tested)"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey50", hjust = 0)
  )

ggsave(
  filename = "celest/plots/tf_family_enrichment_fcombined_plot.pdf", 
  plot = family_enrichment_fcombined_plot,
  width = 12, 
  height = 8, 
  units = "in",
  device = cairo_pdf
)
```


# Match and add TF family names to the top50 TFs

```{r add-tf-families-top50, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}

# Build a name-matching lookup with both locus and sequence names, uppercased

tf_family_lookup_named <- tf_annotation %>%
  select(wormbase_locus, wormbase_gseq, Family_for_FigS4) %>%
  mutate(
    wormbase_locus = toupper(wormbase_locus),
    wormbase_gseq  = toupper(wormbase_gseq)
  ) %>%
  distinct()

top_tf_ranked <- top_tf_ranked %>%
  left_join(
    tf_family_lookup_named %>% select(wormbase_locus, Family_for_FigS4),
    by = c("public_name" = "wormbase_locus")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(family_from_locus = Family_for_FigS4) %>%
  left_join(
    tf_family_lookup_named %>% select(wormbase_gseq, Family_for_FigS4),
    by = c("public_name" = "wormbase_gseq")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(family_from_gseq = Family_for_FigS4) %>%
  mutate(
    Family_for_FigS4 = coalesce(family_from_locus, family_from_gseq)
  ) %>%
  select(-family_from_locus, -family_from_gseq)

top50_tfs <- top_tf_ranked

combined_background <- bind_rows(all_backgrounds_fam) %>%
  distinct(wb_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Family_for_FigS4))
```

# Enrichment test for top50 TFs
```{r enrichment-overall-tf-families-top50, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
enrichment_top50 <- function(top_df, bg_df) {
  families <- unique(bg_df$Family_for_FigS4)
  total_bg  <- nrow(bg_df)
  total_top <- nrow(top_df)

  purrr::map_dfr(families, function(fam) {
    top_in_fam <- sum(top_df$Family_for_FigS4 == fam)
    bg_in_fam  <- sum(bg_df$Family_for_FigS4 == fam)
    mat <- matrix(
      c(
        top_in_fam,
        bg_in_fam - top_in_fam,
        total_top - top_in_fam,
        (total_bg - bg_in_fam) - (total_top - top_in_fam)
      ),
      nrow = 2,
      byrow = TRUE,
      dimnames = list(
        c("in_family", "not_family"),
        c("top50", "not_top50")
      )
    )

    ft <- fisher.test(mat, alternative = "greater")

    tibble(
      family = fam,
      n_top50_in_family = top_in_fam,
      n_top50_total = total_top,
      n_bg_in_family = bg_in_fam,
      n_bg_total = total_bg,
      odds_ratio = unname(ft$estimate),
      p_value = ft$p.value
    )
  })
}

top50_family_enrichment <- enrichment_top50(
  top_df = top50_tfs,
  bg_df = combined_background
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")
  ) %>%
  arrange(p_adj)
```

# Export

```{r export}

write.csv(family_enrichment_fcombined, "celest/output/tf_family_enrichment_fcombined.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(top50_family_enrichment, "celest/output/top50_tf_family_enrichment.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

# Session Info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
